checklist.detail: Profitable all 10 of last 10 yrs — verified via FMP
Dividends paid 45+ years (3.60% yield) — verified via yfinance
EPS grew +207.9% over 10 yrs — verified via FMP

ai_analysis.business_context: Novo Nordisk A/S operates in Drug Manufacturers - General (Healthcare). The company has been profitable in 10 of the last 10 years and maintains a 45-year dividend history.
ai_analysis.metrics_assessment: Metrics reflect exceptionally low P/E ratio, trading well above book value, strong ROE indicating efficient capital use, healthy net margins, liquidity concerns. Graham score of 6/8 and Buffett score of 4/5 provide quantitative validation of underlying quality.
value_trap_flags: Graham criteria failures: Current Ratio >= 2.0, Graham (PExPB <= 22.5); verify these aren't permanent deterioration signals
key_signals: Graham framework validates: Adequate Size (Rev > $1B), Debt / Equity <= 1.0, 10 Yrs Positive Earnings
Buffett quality signals: ROE >= 15% (Competitive Moat), Net Margin >= 10% (Pricing Power)
Dividend aristocrat status (20+ years of payments) suggests stable, mature business with shareholder-friendly management
Superior profitability with both high ROE and margins indicates competitive strength
Consistent profitability through market cycles demonstrates business resilience
disqualifiers: No structural disqualifiers identified; stock passes fundamental quality thresholds
ai_analysis.recommendation_narrative: Promising fundamentals (10.5/13 pts) with moderate checklist support (6/8 Graham). Requires deeper analysis of value trap risks and cyclical context before committing capital.
